raw_response_text:
<features>
- Clustered small flowers with four distinct petals per bloom
- Flower color palette includes bright yellow and warm orange/reddish-orange tones
- Dark reddish-brown flower buds and stems
- Blurred green grassy foliage background
</features>
<kb>
- IF flowers are clustered, four-petaled, with yellow/orange hues and reddish-brown buds/stems THEN class 45
- IF flowers are single purple bloom with a dark central flower center THEN class 44
- IF flowers are large pink/white lotus-style blooms with a prominent yellow central stamen cluster THEN class77
</kb>
<rule_check>
The target image matches the first rule: it features clustered four-petaled flowers in yellow and orange shades, with dark reddish-brown buds and stems set against a green foliage background, which exactly matches the visual patterns of the labeled examples for class 45.
</rule_check>

<response>45</response>

message.reasoning:
Got it, let's work through this step by step. First, the features: the target image has clusters of small, four-petaled flowers in shades of yellow and orange, with dark reddish-brown buds/stems, green foliage background. 

First the <features> section:
- Clustered small flowers with four distinct petals each
- Flower colors range from bright yellow to warm orange/reddish-orange
- Dark reddish-brown flower buds and stems
- Blurred green grassy foliage background

Then the <kb> rules:
- IF flowers are clustered, four-petaled, with yellow/orange hues and reddish-brown buds THEN class 45
- IF flowers are single purple bloom with dark center THEN class 44
- IF flowers are large pink/white lotus-style blooms with prominent central stamens THEN class77

Now the rule check: The target image matches the first rule: it has clustered four-petaled yellow/orange flowers with reddish brown buds/stems, exactly matching the examples for label 45. So the final response is 45.

raw_response_text:
<features>
- Single purple/lavender flower with broad, rounded petals
- Dark purple/brown central flower structure with green and brown reproductive parts
- Green grassy foliage in the background
</features>
<kb>
- IF flower has purple/lavender petals with a dark central flower throat THEN [44]
- IF flower has clustered yellow/orange blooms THEN [45]
- IF flower has large pink/white lotus-style petals with a prominent central receptacle THEN [77]
</kb>
<rule_check>
This target image matches the rule for label 44: it has purple/lavender petals and a dark central flower structure with reproductive parts, exactly matching the visual patterns seen in the previously provided purple flower examples labeled 44.
</rule_check>
<response>44</response>

<features>
- Layered, soft flower petals with pale creamy-white color and subtle pink/purple tips on petal edges
- Prominent yellow central floral structure with tiny clustered dots across its surface
- Large rounded green foliage (lotus-style leaves) in the blurred background
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has layered lotus-style petals, prominent yellow central dotted receptacle, and large green aquatic foliage background] THEN 77
</kb>
<rule_check>
The target image matches the defining features of the 77 class: it has the characteristic layered petal structure of a lotus flower, the distinctive yellow central spoked/dotted receptacle, pale petals with pink edges, and large green lotus leaves in the background, aligning perfectly with the rule for class 77.
</rule_check>

<response>77</response>
